title: Carrier Trade Order Volume
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS orders FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Commodity AS label, SUM(Quantity) AS value FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Commodity ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {orders} carrier trade order(s) placed during the report period. Running carrier trade orders is operating a trading post in space — the commodity volume breakdown shows which markets you've been facilitating and how active your carrier's economy has been for visiting commanders.
details.help: CarrierTradeOrder fires when a trade order is listed on the carrier. orders drives the title as the total listings count.

tagLines: Carrier trade order catalogue compiled. Trade facilitation volume noted in the carrier operations record.
Other commanders came to your carrier to trade. Your orders made that worthwhile for them.
The best carriers have good trade orders. Yours offered something worth stopping for.
